title: ceraia modesta
intro: Ceraia modesta, also known as the Ashwagandha or Indian ginseng, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. It has been used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and adaptogenic effects. The health benefits of Ceraia modesta include stress relief, improved sleep quality, and enhanced physical performance, as well as its ability to support immune function and reduce anxiety. In herbal preparations, Ceraia modesta is often used as a powder, capsule, or extract, and can also be consumed as a tea or added to food and beverages.
